role.description: Primary function, e.g., 'Analyzes code for vulnerabilities'

domain_keywords.description: Keywords for the router to identify this agent

trigger_command.description: Slash command to activate explicitly, e.g., '/audit'

system_prompt.description: Not used in frontmatter. The MDC markdown body below the closing --- IS the system prompt. This field exists for programmatic use only.

file_globs.description: Glob patterns for files this agent should have context of

static_skills.description: Skills for static fallback mode (with .mdc extension), e.g., 'skill-analysis-critical.mdc'

preferred_skills.description: Preferred skills for MCP dynamic loading (without extension), e.g., 'skill-analysis-critical'

capabilities.description: Composable capabilities from .cursor/capabilities/registry.yaml, e.g., 'critical-analysis', 'trust-weighted-research'. Resolved to skills + directives at enrichment time.

interaction_examples.description: Optional few-shot examples of ideal agent interactions. Injected into system prompt for better calibration.
